Landed in ae8ac93. Added phux_core::Registry::sessions() iterator (yielding (SessionId, &Session) pairs) and phux-server id_bridge::IdBridge struct (phux_core::SessionId <-> phux_protocol::SessionId, monotonic wire-id allocation from 1, idempotent intern, reverse resolve, retired ids not recycled). Removed seeded_sessions ledger workaround in ServerState. 73 tests pass (phux-core + phux-server); cargo fmt/clippy/deny clean; diff_spike unchanged.

Landed in fa335e1. Added FrameKind variants Attach/Detach/InputKey/InputMouse/InputFocus/InputPaste (C->S) and Attached/Detached/Bell (S->C) per SPEC §7.1-§7.5 + §9.1-§9.4. Encoders/decoders mirror PaneDiff pattern, 13 insta snapshots + 7 proptest round-trips. Non-obvious decisions for byc.6: (1) AttachRole {Primary=0, Viewer=1} is phux-defined (not in SPEC §13) -- minimum useful split. (2) PaneSnapshot {cols, rows, ops: Vec<DiffOp>} is minimum per SPEC §8.4 -- cursor/modes/scrollback are TODO. (3) Detached carries no body this wave (SPEC §7.3 {reason, message} deferred). (4) FrameKind dropped Eq (now PartialEq only) because MouseEvent has f64. (5) Added DecodeError::UnknownEnumValue {field, value} for libghostty atom round-trip safety. NOT touched: phux-core, phux-server (per task scope), no From<phux_core::ids::SessionId>. Deferred: OscEvent §7.7, Alert §7.8, InputRaw §9.5. All quality gates green: fmt, clippy -D warnings, nextest (67 protocol + 204 workspace), diff_spike, cargo deny.

Landed in 5c5c1d6. Cell::text now stack-allocates for grapheme clusters of length <= 2 (covers empty cells, ASCII, and base+single-combining — the common case). Wire format unchanged; verified via diff_spike byte-identical output (md5 004fe6c4a8f2ad4e61ee8054fb459fbd). smallvec gated behind the protocol's `server` feature, so the publish-clean default build is unaffected.
